mnemonics.title: B-Tree Balance
mnemonics.content: B-Trees Balance By Branching Broadly (Properties: Balanced, Bushy, Branching factor)

mnemonics.title: Index Types
mnemonics.content: CLUster SPreads Data (Clustered = Physical order, Sparse = Partial entries)

acronyms.usage: Early index structure using static multi-level indexes
Enhanced B-tree with linked leaf nodes

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a pyramid: Root at top, leaves at bottom, all leaves same depth
Picture a water bucket filling - when full (overflow), it splits into two

analogies.analogy: Like a book index - direct access to content without reading entire book
Similar to dictionary organization - words sorted physically in storage
